title: Pinpoint scope
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Pinpoint scope''' was a type of [[Scope/Legends|scope]] that increased the effectiveness of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], and [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcasters]] by allowing the user to increase the critical threat range, and possibly resulting in slowing the movement of the target. The best scopes offered significant magnification, meaning that even the humblest of blaster pistols could theoretically be made into a sniping weapon. The Mark II, III & IV scopes in turn allowed for increasingly significant boosts in accuracy over longer ranges.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
